title: EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE/HOMELESS PREVENTION - 211info
text: GOVERNMENT OFFICE EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE/HOMELESS PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing rental assistance or a rental deposit, which may include placement in community-based crisis centers, transitional housing, or motels, or payment of one month of rent or a deposit toward a new rental unit. Assistance is based on funding availability and is not guaranteed. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be enrolled in a federally recognized tribe, and families that are experiencing homelessness. Homelessness that was not caused by eviction for drug or alcohol issues, criminal activity, or any other reason due to the fault of the family, excluding non-payment of rent. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-1310 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 888-9577 Main phone Main phone (541) 888-1310 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Tribal Identification/CIB (Certificate of Indian Blood) Social Security Card, proof of income, photo ID AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Rent Payment Assistance * Native American Community Rental Deposit Assistance * Native American Community Transitional Housing/Shelter * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT LOAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME REPAIR PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - TRIBAL HOUSING INFORMATION SERVICES - TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIRCLES OF HEALING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOVERNMENT OFFICE
